{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318421447C49BF785E61EDC7ECF"}"},"total":105},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7393700833044529945","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哇塞！这本以真实历史为背景的武侠小说太绝啦！
历史背景超真实，仿佛人物就在那个时代。但最牛的还是打斗场面，作者描写得像放电影，画面感超强，高手过招超燃，看得我心跳加速！真的香，都去看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721482789,"group_id":"7349485538581154840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现实主义的浪漫作家。笑谈江湖事，淡看风云路。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N39W2ac0IB9/fzrd5p/hOf0i8TjYr10bqTzzwcogOYda","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de867f9fefde413996a0c8255d3b4cf4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793546&x-signature=OpZTOIzYfiPYe5%2B%2B1sDNCh48rYw%3D","user_id":"3496052445414579","user_name":"桑树下的粪球"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3496052445414579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349485538581154840","book_info":{"abstract":"澶渊之战后，尽管宋朝获胜，然而宋真宗赵恒却签订了向辽国缴纳“岁币”的“城下之盟”。在国内，他推行重文轻武的政策，还封禅泰山、大肆修建宫殿，搞封建迷信活动，劳民伤财，致使国库空虚。不但未能收复燕云十六州，就连曾经向宋朝称臣归附的党项部落也趁机崛起。
党项人李德明、李元昊父子励精图治，在汉人张浦、张元的帮助下，不断改革，壮大党项的实力，经过多次对外战争，打败了周边的少数民族部落，先后夺取定难五州和河西地区，控制了河西走廊，并开始与宋朝对抗。
柴无畏江湖人称，西北剑神，本是后周世宗柴荣的孙子，自幼在华山习武学道，练得无敌剑法，又精通兵法。本来对大宋重文抑武政策极为不满。后面结识府州佘家千金，佘牡丹，并两人相爱。柴无畏在佘家人的劝说下，开始帮助宋朝对抗辽国和平定西夏。
先后参加了多场对外战争，包括于阗保卫战、金明寨之战、三川口之战、好水川之战、定川寨之战。期间涌现出多位英雄人物，包括：狄青、种世衡、刘平、石元孙等。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe98d6dccd083c88a14cadad28bdb451f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"桑树下的粪球","author_id":"","book_id":"7349485538581154840","book_name":"北宋群英录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#906040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7349485543538835992","read_count":"128","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"710310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"270","tags":"历史古代,历史,无敌,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe98d6dccd083c88a14cadad28bdb451f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446534&x-signature=ui7zMBlXoZSRZXDCVsz8MFhaxJ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3496052445414579","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318421447C49BF785E61EDC7ECF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6040,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":118},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1723278024,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402452452963533593","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在这本书中，作者以细腻且生动的笔触，刻画了众多性格鲜明、形象饱满的人物。无论是武艺高强、忠勇卫国的武将，还是足智多谋、心怀天下的文臣，都仿佛从历史的尘埃中走出，变得鲜活而真实。他们有着各自的理想与抱负，在北宋的历史舞台上尽情演绎着自己的人生传奇。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723520890,"group_id":"7349485538581154840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/X38l58sD4VF3ZgsierW0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"372108323467872","user_name":"用户名65092276"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"372108323467872","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349485538581154840","book_info":{"abstract":"澶渊之战后，尽管宋朝获胜，然而宋真宗赵恒却签订了向辽国缴纳“岁币”的“城下之盟”。在国内，他推行重文轻武的政策，还封禅泰山、大肆修建宫殿，搞封建迷信活动，劳民伤财，致使国库空虚。不但未能收复燕云十六州，就连曾经向宋朝称臣归附的党项部落也趁机崛起。
党项人李德明、李元昊父子励精图治，在汉人张浦、张元的帮助下，不断改革，壮大党项的实力，经过多次对外战争，打败了周边的少数民族部落，先后夺取定难五州和河西地区，控制了河西走廊，并开始与宋朝对抗。

先后参加了多场对外战争，包括于阗保卫战、金明寨之战、三川口之战、好水川之战、定川寨之战。期间涌现出多位英雄人物，包括：狄青、种世衡、刘平、石元孙等。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe98d6dccd083c88a14cadad28bdb451f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"桑树下的粪球","author_id":"","book_id":"7349485538581154840","book_name":"北宋群英录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#906040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7349485543538835992","read_count":"128","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"710310"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"270","tags":"历史古代,历史,无敌,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe98d6dccd083c88a14cadad28bdb451f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446534&x-signature=ui7zMBlXoZSRZXDCVsz8MFhaxJ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3496052445414579","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318421447C49BF785E61EDC7ECF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":26},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1723543630,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402443620408574745","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书中对北宋时期的社会风貌、文化习俗等方面也有着精彩的描绘。从繁华的东京汴梁城到宁静的乡村小镇，从诗词歌赋的盛行到民间技艺的精湛，让读者仿佛穿越时空，亲身感受到了北宋时期的独特韵味和文化底蕴。这不仅丰富了故事的背景，也使得读者对北宋的历史有了更全面、更深入的认识。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723518604,"group_id":"7349485538581154840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5Ki+mKw9553Hi/5F68xIvZ7YhQ63RLCRPvLmVs8PwNM","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3056268447328643","user_name":"爱吃冰黄瓜的黑医门"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3056268447328643","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7349485538581154840","book_info":{"abstract":"澶渊之战后，尽管宋朝获胜，然而宋真宗赵恒却签订了向辽国缴纳“岁币”的“城下之盟”。在国内，他推行重文轻武的政策，还封禅泰山、大肆修建宫殿，搞封建迷信活动，劳民伤财，致使国库空虚。不但未能收复燕云十六州，就连曾经向宋朝称臣归附的党项部落也趁机崛起。
